reviews.comment:
Mala atencion. No quisieron cargarme combustible argumentando que no habia sistema. Miercoles 9 de Junio, 22.33 hs. Ya se había solucionado el problema de la aplicación y no le intereso verificar lo que le decia ni hablar con su supervisor para verificarlo. Según el no habia sistema. La aplicacion luego de 5 hs de no funcionar se habia normalizado

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. They refused to fill my tank, claiming the system was down. Wednesday, June 9th, 10:33 PM. The app problem had already been resolved, but they didn't bother to verify what I was saying or speak to their supervisor to check. According to them, the system was down. The app had finally returned to normal after being down for 5 hours.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxMGRIM2NBEAE
